# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Application, Router } from "https://deno.land/x/oak@v12.6.0/mod.ts";

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  department: string;
}

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

const router = new Router();

// Create or update user
router.post("/users", async (ctx) => {
  const body = await ctx.request.body({ type: "json" }).value;
  const user: User = {
    id: crypto.randomUUID(),
    name: body.name,
    email: body.email,
    age: body.age,
    department: body.department,
  };

  await kv.set(["users", user.id], user);
  await kv.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user);
  await kv.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
  await kv.set(["users_by_age", user.age, user.id], user);

  ctx.response.body = { message: "User created", user };
});

// Search users with flexible filters
router.get("/users", async (ctx) => {
  const { email, department, minAge, maxAge, name } = ctx.request.url.searchParams;
  
  let results: User[] = [];
  
  if (email) {
    const user = await kv.get<User>(["users_by_email", email]);
    if (user.value) {
      results.push(user.value);
    }
  } else if (department) {
    const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users_by_department", department] });
    const users = [];
    for await (const res of iter) {
      users.push(res.value);
    }
    results = users;
  } else if (minAge || maxAge) {
    const min = parseInt(minAge || "0");
    const max = parseInt(maxAge || "1000");
    
    const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users_by_age"] });
    const users = [];
    for await (const res of iter) {
      if (res.value.age >= min && res.value.age <= max) {
        users.push(res.value);
      }
    }
    results = users;
  } else if (name) {
    const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users"] });
    const users = [];
    for await (const res of iter) {
      if (res.value.name.toLowerCase().includes(name.toLowerCase())) {
        users.push(res.value);
      }
    }
    results = users;
  } else {
    const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ["users"] });
    const users = [];
    for await (const res of iter) {
      users.push(res.value);
    }
    results = users;
  }
  
  ctx.response.body = { users: results };
});

// Get user by ID
router.get("/users/:id", async (ctx) => {
  const { id } = ctx.params;
  const user = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  
  if (!user.value) {
    ctx.response.status = 404;
    ctx.response.body = { error: "User not found" };
    return;
  }
  
  ctx.response.body = { user: user.value };
});

// Update user
router.put("/users/:id", async (ctx) => {
  const { id } = ctx.params;
  const body = await ctx.request.body({ type: "json" }).value;
  
  const user = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  if (!user.value) {
    ctx.response.status = 404;
    ctx.response.body = { error: "User not found" };
    return;
  }
  
  const updatedUser: User = { ...user.value, ...body };
  
  await kv.set(["users", id], updatedUser);
  await kv.set(["users_by_email", updatedUser.email], updatedUser);
  await kv.set(["users_by_department", updatedUser.department, id], updatedUser);
  await kv.set(["users_by_age", updatedUser.age, id], updatedUser);
  
  ctx.response.body = { message: "User updated", user: updatedUser };
});

// Delete user
router.delete("/users/:id", async (ctx) => {
  const { id } = ctx.params;
  
  const user = await kv.get<User>(["users", id]);
  if (!user.value) {
    ctx.response.status = 404;
    ctx.response.body = { error: "User not found" };
    return;
  }
  
  await kv.delete(["users", id]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_email", user.value.email]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_department", user.value.department, id]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_age", user.value.age, id]);
  
  ctx.response.body = { message: "User deleted" };
});

const app = new Application();
app.use(router.routes());
app.use(router.allowedMethods());

await app.listen({ port: 8000 });
